name: Equivalence of Additive and Multiplicative Perturbations
statement_text:
Let α, β ∈ G1 ; then

                                 α = β + Hp                            (388a)

if and only if
                               α = β(1 + Hp ).                         (388b)
proof_text:
Proof. Both (388a) and (388b) are equivalent to the statement α(t) = β(t)
for all t such that r(t) ≤ p.
